{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Alin's golden hound
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Alin]] possesses a conjured gold-armored hound.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
